sign_up.email_verification_required: A confirmation link has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox to complete your registration.

sign_in.email_verification_required: A confirmation link has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox to verify your email and complete your registration.
sign_in.email_status_invalid: There is a problem with your email address and it cannot receive emails. Please update your email to continue.

forgot.success: If your email address exists in our database, you will receive a password recovery link at your email address in a few minutes.

reset.invalid_token: This password reset token is invalid or has expired.
reset.success: Your password has been reset successfully.

verify.resend_success: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

update_email.invalid_token: This token is invalid or has expired.
update_email.email_in_use: This email address is already in use.
update_email.success: Your email has been updated. A verification link has been sent to your new email address.

transfer.new_owner_not_found: The new owner is not a member of this workspace.
transfer.new_owner_max_workspaces: The new owner has reached the maximum number of workspaces they can own.

store.no_verified_credential: The user does not have a verified credential.
store.already_member: User is already a member of this workspace.

destroy.cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove yourself from the workspace.

update.cannot_update_self: You cannot update your own role.
update.cannot_change_owner_role: The owner's role cannot be changed.
update.cannot_promote_to_owner: Ownership can only be transferred, not assigned.

leave.cannot_leave_as_owner: Owners cannot leave a workspace. Transfer ownership or delete the workspace instead.
